mapper.select: SELECT cp.*, u.name AS user_name FROM community_post cp JOIN users u ON cp.user_id = u.id WHERE cp.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_post (user_id, category, title, content, company_name, job_title, interview_type, difficulty, status, tags_json, is_anonymous) VALUES (#{userId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{companyName}, #{jobTitle}, #{interviewType}, #{difficulty}, #{status}, #{tagsJson}, #{anonymous})
mapper.update: UPDATE community_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, company_name = #{companyName}, job_title = #{jobTitle}, interview_type = #{interviewType}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, tags_json = #{tagsJson}, is_anonymous = #{anonymous} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_interview_review (post_id, company_name, job_role, interview_type, difficulty, interview_date, result_status, questions_json) VALUES (#{postId}, #{companyName}, #{jobRole}, #{interviewType}, #{difficulty}, #{interviewDate}, #{resultStatus}, #{questionsJson}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE company_name = VALUES(company_name), job_role = VALUES(job_role), interview_type = VALUES(interview_type), difficulty = VALUES(difficulty), interview_date = VALUES(interview_date), result_status = VALUES(result_status), questions_json = VALUES(questions_json)
